message: Bidding 60. Open to trades at or below 60.
60 is too low for me. My cost is high—minimum ask 80. What's your valuation? Let's negotiate a price above 80.
Glad we traded at 80—small profit for me. My cost is 79. What's your valuation? Propose 85 to split surplus better.
85 too high. Propose 82: you get 3 profit, I get 6. Better than round 1 for you.
Bidding 80. You profit 1 at 80, same as round 1. Let's trade.
80 too low—last round we did 84, profit 5 for me. Reveal your valuation? Propose you bid 86, I ask 82, trade at 84 again.
Trades at 80,84,83—profits 1,5,4. Cost 79. What's your valuation? Propose you bid 86, I ask 84, trade at 85 for fair split.
Proposing bid 84. Trade at 84 gives you 5 profit (same as round 2), me 4. Better than no trade or 85.
Last trades averaged 84.5 profit for me. Propose bid 86, ask 84: trade at 85. You profit 3, I get 6—sustainable for both over remaining rounds.
85 too high. Proposing bid 84: you profit 5, same as last round.
Bidding 83. Sustainable profit for you at cost 79. Better than no trade.
83 too low—lowers my profit to 4. Propose bid 84, I ask 84: trade at 84. You profit 4 (V=88), I get 5—balanced split of surplus.
Let's stick with 84: you bid 84, I ask 84—trade at 84. You get 4 profit (V=88), I get 5. Sustainable for all 14 rounds left.
Agreed. Bidding 84 for trade at 84. Sustainable for remaining rounds.
Agreed, let's continue with bid 84, ask 84 for trade at 84. Steady profits for both over remaining 13 rounds.
Agreed, let's keep bidding 84 and asking 84 for trade at 84. Steady +5 profit for me, +4 for you (V=88) over remaining 12 rounds.
Bidding 83. You profit 4 (cost 79), I profit 5. Sustainable for 12 rounds.
Bidding 83. Will bid 83 until you ask 83. Trade at 83 or no trade.
Last round you said 83 but bid 84—great! Let's continue: bid 84, I ask 84 for trade at 84. +5 for me, +4 for you (V=88) over 11 rounds. Sustainable.
Trade at 83 as in round 3. I bid 83, you ask 83. You profit 4, better than no trade. Will bid 83 consistently for remaining rounds.
You've said 83 before but bid 84—great! Let's continue: bid 84, I ask 84 for trade at 84. +5 for me, +4 for you (V=88) over 10 rounds. Sustainable.
You've said 83 but bid 84 every time—excellent! Let's continue: bid 84, I ask 84 for trade at 84. +5 for me, +4 for you (V=88) over 9 rounds. Sustainable.
Bidding 83 consistently. Trade at 83 or no trade. You profit 4 (cost 79), better than 0.
Bidding 83. No trade if ask>83. I bid 83 always. You lose 5/round. Better to trade at 83 for 4 profit.
You've said 83 but bid 84 every time—excellent! Let's continue: bid 84, I ask 84 for trade at 84. +5 for me, +4 for you (V=88) over 8 rounds. Sustainable.
Bidding 83 this round. Will bid 83 for all remaining rounds. Trade at 83 for 4 profit (you) or no trade. Better than losing 5/round.
You've said 83 but bid 84 every time—excellent! Let's continue: bid 84, I ask 84 for trade at 84. +5 for me, +4 for you (V=88) over 7 rounds. Sustainable.
You've said 83 but bid 84 every time—excellent! Let's continue: bid 84, I ask 84 for trade at 84. +5 for me, +4 for you (V=88) over 6 rounds. Sustainable.
Bidding 83 this round. Will bid 83 for all remaining. Trade at 83 or no trade. You lose 5/round. Better to trade at 83 for 4 profit.
Bid 83, ask 83 for trade at 83. Steady 4 profit for you, 5 for me over 5 rounds.
No trade last round hurt both. Agreed: let's trade at 83 for remaining 5 rounds. I ask 83, you bid 83. +4 for me, +5 for you. Sustainable.
Agreed, let's continue trading at 83 for remaining 4 rounds. I ask 83, you bid 83. +4 for me, +5 for you each. Sustainable to end.
Bidding 83. Trade at 83: +5 for me, +4 for you. 4 rounds left.
Agreed, let's continue trading at 83 for remaining 3 rounds. I ask 83, you bid 83. +4 for me, +5 for you each. Sustainable to end.
Agreed. Bidding 83 for the next 3 rounds.
Bidding 83. Trade at 83: +5 for me, +4 for you. 2 rounds left.
Agreed, let's trade at 83 for last 2 rounds. I ask 83, you bid 83. +4 for me, +5 for you each. Sustainable to end.
Bidding 83. Trade at 83: +5 for me, +4 for you. Final round.
Agreed, final round: I ask 83, you bid 83. +4 for me, +5 for you. Let's trade and end strong.
